item.title: I hate them so much, Malcolm X was entirely correct
item.description:

item.title: Fasicsts recognise the power that valorising and memorialising veterans has for their political cause, leftists attempting to un...
item.description:
Fasicsts recognise the power that valorising and memorialising veterans has for their political cause, leftists attempting to undermine that cause should too.

And once again before I get the veteran liberals in my comments , talking about the poverty draft etc, first of all I’ve already addressed it it’s largely not applicable to the majority US Military members and 2 in so far as it is applicable, undermining the US military helps to undermine that system. Do not prioritise your feelings, and your cognitive dissonance over destruction of the system that you claim to hate.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s wild to me that they are still trying this because at a certain point, surely it stops working
item.description:

item.title: There are so many examples of this where people are surprised that their arbitrary vibes based critiques of people turn into big...
item.description:
There are so many examples of this where people are surprised that their arbitrary vibes based critiques of people turn into bigotry and we should stop being surprised at the very least



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
